primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes SGLT2 inhibitors as standard of care for CKD with and without diabetes

primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2021 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Glomerular Diseases
primary_sources.relevance: Addresses complement inhibitors and emerging therapies for glomerular diseases

primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Anemia in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Updated recommendations include HIF-PH inhibitors for CKD anemia management

primary_sources.name: Finerenone in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease and Type 2 Diabetes (FIDELITY)
primary_sources.relevance: Landmark trial establishing efficacy of nsMRA finerenone in diabetic CKD

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases Novel Therapeutics Review Series
secondary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive reviews of emerging CKD therapeutics and mechanisms

gaps: Limited long-term safety data for newer agents like HIF-PH inhibitors
Evolving evidence on optimal combination therapy strategies
Cost-effectiveness analyses for novel therapeutic classes
